title: Toy Story (1995)

title: Jumanji (1995)
tmdb_overview: When siblings Judy and Peter discover an enchanted board game that opens the door to a magical world, they unwittingly invite Alan -- an adult who's been trapped inside the game for 26 years -- into their living room. title: Grumpier Old Men (1995)
